response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of production experience, solid TypeScript/Python-adjacent stacks, cloud deployment (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and genuine customer-facing and mentoring credentials through workshops and consulting. However, the role demands 8+ years building AI-driven solutions, and his hands-on GenAI exposure appears limited to roughly one year at re:cinq working on MCP code generators and agentic tooling. There is no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, which are core to this position.
strengths: Current hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow infrastructure, directly relevant to the role's key technologies
Deep full-stack and systems breadth (TypeScript, Node.js, low-latency services, cloud, Kubernetes) with a testing/craftsmanship discipline suited to production-grade delivery
Proven mentorship and stakeholder-facing skills via multi-day courses, conference talks, and consulting engagements
concerns: Falls well short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; GenAI experience spans roughly one year
No evidence of RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability pipelines, or frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
No advanced degree or formal AI/ML background, and much of the career history is in web/embedded rather than data pipelines for AI
